mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bill (amount, bill_type, created_at, description, elder_id) VALUES (#{amount}, #{billType}, #{createdAt}, #{description}, #{elderId})
mapper.update: UPDATE bill SET amount = #{amount}, bill_type = #{billType}, created_at = #{createdAt}, description = #{description}, elder_id = #{elderId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, amount, bill_type, created_at, description, elder_id FROM bill
